name: @u1f992/kvadrat

scripts.format:wasm: npm run devcontainer:up && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make -C wasm format
scripts.tidy:wasm: npm run devcontainer:up && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make -C wasm tidy
scripts.build:wasm: npm run devcontainer:up && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make -C wasm
scripts.build:wasm:debug: npm run devcontainer:up && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make -C wasm debug
scripts.clean:wasm: npm run devcontainer:up && devcontainer exec --workspace-folder . make -C wasm clean
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:version && tsc && shx mkdir -p dist/wasm && shx cp src/wasm/core.js src/wasm/core.wasm dist/wasm/
scripts.test: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:test && node --test "test/**/*.test.ts"

author: Koutaro Mukai
description: Vectorizes bitmap images using layered recursive decomposition with z-ordered rectangle output.
